jobs.title: Environmental Health Safety Specialist
jobs.description:
Company:
Confidential (represented by Southland Search Group)
Location
: Los Angeles, CA | Beverly Hills, CA | San Diego, CA
Work Authorization:
Must be authorized to work in the U.S. – no current or future sponsorship

About the Company:

A construction organization with operations across Southern California delivers a range of complex construction projects and is committed to maintaining a strong culture of safety, compliance, and operational excellence. The company works closely with project teams, subcontractors, and regulatory agencies to ensure high standards are upheld across all phases of construction.

Position Summary:

The Safety Specialist
serves as a key field representative for health, safety, and environmental programs, supporting project teams in implementing and maintaining site-specific safety initiatives. This role is responsible for identifying hazards, ensuring subcontractor compliance, supporting safety training, and assisting with incident investigations and regulatory interactions. The position offers strong exposure to field operations and the opportunity to grow within a structured safety program while working closely with leadership and project teams.

Qualifications:

4+ years safety experience, preferably in the construction industry.
Bachelor’s degree in Environmental Health & Safety or related field preferred, or equivalent experience.
OSHA 30 Hour Construction Certification required.
CPR / First Aid / AED Certification required.

This is a confidential search
conducted by our firm. If you're interested, reach out to monica@southlandsearchgroup.com or call at (951) 999-0804 for a private discussion.

Show more

Show less

Seniority level

Mid-Senior level

Employment type

Full-time

Job function

Engineering and Management

Industries

Construction and Civil Engineering
